scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace shared" "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace website"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:website
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run test --workspace client && npm run test --workspace server
